title: Masterplug Four Socket 15 Metre Cassette Reel, Large Extension Lead Cable Reel, Wind-Up Retractable Power Cord Reel, Thermal Cut Out, Work Power, Blue/Black, 10A, 4G, 15m, LCT1510/4BL
features: A LARGE 10A CASSETTE REEL WITH ROBUST DESIGN: From Masterplug's Work Power range, an impact-resistant drum offers a versatile power access solution. It's ideal for home, DIY and light industrial use

SAFETY FIRST: Features a thermal cut-out which prevents cable overheating when fully reeled and requires manual reset after activation. Four shuttered sockets prevent the insertion of foreign objects. Manufactured to BS EN 61242 safety standards

EXTEND THE REACH OF SOCKETS WITH 15M CABLE: Providing power where you need it the most. Connect four devices with four sockets into one outlet which automatically close when not in use preventing the insertion of foreign objects, ensuring user safety

EASY TO REWIND, TRANSPORT AND STORE WITH COMPACT DESIGN: A pull out drum wind handle and rear grip ensure you can comfortably rewind the cable and transport the reel with ease. Suitable for indoor power tools, lighting and workshops
MASTERPLUG'S 1-YEAR MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: As well as offering a one-year warranty, Masterplug have a dedicated technical support team, who are there to help you
